Description: Cart icon click opens mini-cart panel
Steps: 1. Click cart icon in header
Expected Result: Mini-cart drawer/panel becomes visible. Close button and product area are present.

Description: Cart count in header increments after adding a product
Preconditions: Guest user; empty cart; in-stock product on PDP
Steps: 1. Read cart icon count (baseline 0) 2. Add product from PDP 3. Read cart icon count again
Expected Result: Count increments by 1 (or by the qty added).

Description: Removing a product from mini-cart decrements count and updates subtotal
Steps: 1. Open mini-cart 2. Click remove on product 3. Observe count and subtotal
Expected Result: Product is removed. Count decrements. Subtotal updates to $0 or empty-state is shown.

Description: Increasing and decreasing qty in mini-cart updates subtotal
Preconditions: Cart has 1 product; qty controls enabled
Steps: 1. Open mini-cart 2. Increase qty by 1 3. Read subtotal 4. Decrease qty by 1 5. Read subtotal
Expected Result: Subtotal after increase = price × new-qty. After decrease = price × original-qty.

Description: Checkout CTA in mini-cart navigates to checkout
Steps: 1. Open mini-cart 2. Click Checkout CTA
Expected Result: URL changes to match checkout URL pattern (/checkout).

Description: Mini-cart subtotal equals sum of item prices × quantities
Steps: 1. Open mini-cart 2. Read item price × qty for each line 3. Compare with displayed subtotal
Expected Result: Subtotal matches expected sum (within rounding tolerance).

Description: Empty mini-cart shows empty-state message and no product rows
Steps: 1. Open mini-cart
Expected Result: Empty state message is visible. No product rows present. Continue shopping CTA is visible.

Description: Mini-cart product row shows image + name + variant + price
Steps: 1. Add product with size and colour 2. Open mini-cart 3. Inspect product row
Expected Result: Product image, name, selected size, selected colour, and price are all visible and non-empty.

Description: Clicking product name or image in mini-cart navigates to PDP
Steps: 1. Open mini-cart 2. Click product image or name
Expected Result: URL changes to the product's PDP path.

Description: Mini-cart closes via close button
Steps: 1. Click close button or backdrop
Expected Result: Mini-cart panel is no longer visible.
Notes: Close is transform:translateX() animation — assert panel not visible after transition

Description: View Cart/Bag CTA in mini-cart navigates to /cart
Preconditions: Mini-cart is open; Cart has product
Steps: 1. Click View Cart/Bag link
Expected Result: URL becomes /cart and cart page is displayed.

Description: Cart count shows 0 or is hidden when cart is empty
Steps: 1. Open any page 2. Observe cart icon count
Expected Result: Count is 0 or icon shows no numeric badge.

Description: Product added from PDP appears in mini-cart with correct variant
Steps: 1. Select colour and size 2. Click Add to Cart/Bag 3. Open mini-cart
Expected Result: Mini-cart shows exact product name + selected size + selected colour.

Description: Removing last item in mini-cart shows empty state
Steps: 1. Open mini-cart 2. Remove product
Expected Result: Empty state is displayed. Cart count is 0.

Description: Removing one item in multi-item cart leaves other items intact
Steps: 1. Open mini-cart 2. Remove one product
Expected Result: Only the removed product disappears. Other items remain unchanged.

Description: Afterpay/payment messaging is displayed in mini-cart when feature is enabled
Preconditions: Cart has product; brand has miniCartPaymentMessaging=true
Steps: 1. Add product 2. Open mini-cart 3. Inspect footer/messaging area
Expected Result: Payment messaging (Afterpay or similar) is visible and non-empty.
Notes: Skechers disables this — validated in MC-skx-001

Description: Mini-cart is functional on mobile viewport
Steps: 1. Add product 2. Tap cart icon 3. Verify mini-cart panel opens 4. Tap Checkout CTA
Expected Result: Mini-cart opens. Checkout CTA is visible and navigates to /checkout.

Description: Product added via Quick Add from PLP appears in mini-cart
Steps: 1. Navigate to PLP 2. Click Quick Add on first product 3. Select size if required 4. Add 5. Open mini-cart
Expected Result: Mini-cart contains the quick-added product.

Description: Sale product shows original and discounted price in mini-cart
Steps: 1. Add a sale product 2. Open mini-cart
Expected Result: Sale price and original price are both visible in the product row.
Notes: @data-dependent — sale item may not exist at all times

Description: Qty cannot be set below 1; remove is triggered or qty is blocked
Preconditions: Cart has product; qty decrease supported
Steps: 1. Open mini-cart 2. Decrease qty to 0 or below
Expected Result: Either product is removed OR qty reverts to 1 OR remove confirmation appears.

Description: Mini-cart contents persist after page navigation
Steps: 1. Open any page 2. Navigate to another page 3. Open mini-cart
Expected Result: Cart contents are unchanged.

Description: Mini-cart contents persist after page refresh
Steps: 1. Add product 2. Refresh page 3. Open mini-cart
Expected Result: Product is still present in mini-cart.

Description: Remove-from-cart action fires a dataLayer event
Preconditions: Analytics tools available; Cart has product
Steps: 1. Intercept dataLayer.push 2. Remove product from mini-cart 3. Read captured events
Expected Result: At least one event matching /remove|cart_update|cart/i is captured.
Notes: Partial — verifies event fires; payload schema not validated

Description: Skechers mini-cart does NOT display Afterpay messaging
Steps: 1. Add product 2. Open mini-cart 3. Inspect entire mini-cart body
Expected Result: Mini-cart body text does NOT contain /afterpay|after pay|4 payments|installments/i.
Notes: Brand feature flag miniCartPaymentMessaging=false for Skechers

Description: Dr. Martens mini-cart View CTA uses "Bag" (not "Cart")
Preconditions: Dr. Martens project; Cart has product
Steps: 1. Open mini-cart 2. Inspect View Cart/Bag CTA text
Expected Result: CTA text matches /bag/i. Does NOT contain standalone word "cart" or "basket".

Description: Vans mini-cart payment messaging mentions PayPal as an option
Preconditions: Vans project; Cart has product with total eligible for PayPal
Steps: 1. Add product 2. Open mini-cart 3. Inspect payment messaging
Expected Result: Messaging contains /paypal|pay in 4|braintree/i in addition to Afterpay.
Notes: Vans supports Afterpay + Braintree CC + PayPal + PayPal Pay-in-4
